narrative:
Jackson (precinct in Highland County) has 662 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
